library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Bill of sale for an eighth of a house in Cairo. Seller: Ṣadaqa b. Abū l-Khayr. Buyer: Dhakhīra bt. ʿEli. Location: Cairo. Dated: Tammuz 1452 Seleucid = June/July 1141 CE. The price of 10 dinars is mentioned. Signed: the cantor Moshe b. Yehuda; [Maḥās]in(?) b. Seʿadya (this part is torn away and partially concealed by the black tab from the folder where it was photographed). The seller's brother Abū Isḥāq is mentioned. Join: Alan Elbaum
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
